title: TBC2
description: TBC2 is the Gen3 dual video input and time-base correct module: two independent decode paths, a full system sync engine, 1V patchable encoders, and still/sequence playback from the front-panel microSD slot—decoding and reference glue for a modular LZX system in 16 HP. Menu structure, submodules, MicroSD use, and firmware are documented in the Manual. The Specs tab lists connectors and data from the LZX module knowledge base.

seo.title: TBC2 | LZX Industries
seo.description: TBC2: Gen3 dual video input, time-base correction, sync, and 1V encoders. Full Manual and Specs on lzxindustries.com.
